body:
The protests are for the name chosen.

The protests are not for any other reason. Even simple logic will tell you that. What can be a reason for protests 1. naming a cultural club to a fascist nazi colaborator or 2. because it is a cultural club?

some of the media, the name of course is the issue:

OP, how does Bungie’s dong taste? I can’t imagine white knighting a corporation that doesn’t give a fuck about you but boy do gamers feel the need to do it.
CalorieMates are so incredibly delicious, that they are in the cookie and biscuit section.

I have no problem with people who disagree. You can look at the other comments to see that. What I have a problem with is jackasses who think they get to tell me what I can and can't make suggestions about.
